title: Change in the Management and Operation of One Person Corporation
content: 35 (OPC) due to the Death or Temporary or Permanent Incapacity of the 36 Incorporator/Sole Stockholder. Within thirty (30) calendar days after the death or 37 incapacity of the incorporator/sole stockholder, the documentary requirements prescribed 38 by the Department should be submitted. 39 40 Failure to report the death or incapacity of the incorporator within the 30-day period given 41 shall cause the revocation of the OPC’s license and the inclusion of the nominee in the 42 derogatory record. 43 44 The nominee or the alternative nominee of the OPC shall manage and operate the LMA 45 in case of the death or incapacity of the incorporator/sole stockholder of the OPC; 46 Provided, that the nominee and/or the alternative nominee must have all the 47 qualifications and none of the disqualifications to engage in the business of recruitment; 48 Provided that, the designated legal heirs of the single stockholder have been lawfully 49 determined, and the heirs have designated one of them or have agreed that the estate 50 shall be the single stockholder of the OPC , as provided by the applicable law; Provided 51 further, that the designated single stockholder of the OPC has all the qualifications and 52 none of the disqualifications under these Rules. 53 54 Once a temporary incapacity ends, the incorporator/sole stockholder can resume the 55 management and operation of the OPC upon duly informing the SEC and 56 acknowledgment of the Department. 57 58
